description_long: This object is a cylindrical hat with a flat top and straight sides, reminiscent of a traditional fez or pillbox style. The hat is solid in color, with a smooth, unadorned surface and no visible seams or decorative elements. The crown is tall and flat-topped, giving it a distinctive, formal appearance. The brim is absent, with the base of the hat sitting flush against the head. The material appears to be a dense fabric or felt, likely providing a semi-soft texture. The overall design is minimalist and utilitarian, suitable for ceremonial or formal urban settings.
description: A tall, cylindrical, flat-topped hat with smooth, unadorned sides and no brim, resembling a fez or pillbox style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the hat's straight, vertical sides and flat top, with no brim or decorations visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical, cylindrical shape and the clean, featureless surface of the hat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the straight profile and flat top, confirming the absence of any side features.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the uniform cylindrical shape and the seamless connection to the head, with no visible adornments.
